[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000001 1
1 0000100000 1
2 1110110010 6
3 1010000100 3
4 1111001011 7
5 0011100110 5
6 1011000111 6
7 0011111010 6

01 10 0011000010 3
12 21 0000000000 a
23 32 0000100000 1 match 1
34 43 1010000000 2
45 54 1010000000 2
56 65 0011000010 3
67 76 0011000110 4
70 07 0011000010 3

02 20 0000100000 1 match 1
13 31 0010000010 2
24 42 0000000000 a
35 53 1110000010 4
46 64 0010000100 2
57 75 1011000011 5
60 06 0011100010 4
71 17 0011000011 4

14 41 0010000000 1
25 52 0000000000 a
36 63 0010100010 3
47 74 1010000100 3 match 3
50 05 0011001010 4
61 16 0011000010 3
72 27 0000000000 a
